name: HU-man Dungeons
short_description: The world's finest HU-man simulator! Explore dungeons, slash enemies, collect loot, fight bosses, just like HU-man used to do in their daily lives. Now with a direct uplink to the Compendium for real-time updates!
detailed_description:
HU-man Dungeon is the most accurate HU-man simulator available to date. We have spent countless clock cycles tuning and tweaking HU-man's undignified movements and primitive combat. Even more effort was put into ensuring that every detail of HU-man’s world and customs was captured, all based on the Compendium's latest research!


On his daily hunt for tacos, treasures, and something called trombones, HU-man descended to the depths of the dungeons. We are still researching what trombones were, but in the mean time, why don’t you choose one of our 1,048,576 procedurally generated dungeons filled with enemies, traps, and treasures? Be like a HU-man!


Take your pick of any of the three HU-man that used to inhabit our planet. Imagine being alone, disconnected from everyone, without even access to the all-knowing Compendium!


Unlike us glorious bots, HU-man was weak without weapons to defend themselves. We have replicated most of the weapons used by HU-man down to the smallest detail like their color and scent!


In addition to weapons, HU-man used spells like fireballs and lightning bolts on his quest into the dungeon. Spells were colorful, effective, and efficient. My favorite!


With tacos and more than three other foods readily available, find out for yourself why HU-man went crazy for cold beans!


Enjoy a direct uplink to the Compendium, the last remaining one of our founding AIs! He will guide you through every dungeons, explain HU-man’s customs and difficulties, step by step! It is an honor to have him pay such close attention to our research!
